display.purpose: The shuffle name, focus prompt, wordmark, scoreboard numbers. Read from across the room.

body.purpose: All operational UI: detail text, hints, labels, controls.

shadows.name: ambient-small
shadows.purpose: Resting lift on stat tiles, active tab, active card.

shadows.name: hover-medium
shadows.purpose: A choosable topic card lifting on hover.

shadows.name: cta
shadows.purpose: The primary Pick button sits slightly proud.

shadows.name: spotlight-glow
shadows.purpose: The settled name's warm halo on the dark stage; the stage's only elevation, carried by light.

motion.name: t-slow
motion.purpose: The spotlight bloom and focus settle.

motion.name: ease-expo
motion.purpose: The spotlight bloom and entrance reveals.

components.name: Primary Button (Pick)
components.description: The single most important board action: roll the next participant.
components.css: .ds-cta { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 9px; font-family: 'Source Sans 3', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.9375rem; font-weight: 600; color: #fff; background: #004165; border: 1px solid transparent; border-radius: 11px; padding: 13px 22px; cursor: pointer; box-shadow: 0 6px 20px -8px rgba(0,65,101,.45); transition: background 130ms cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1), transform 130ms cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1), box-shadow 130ms; } .ds-cta svg { width: 18px; height: 18px; } .ds-cta:hover { background: #002f49; transform: translateY(-1px); box-shadow: 0 10px 26px -10px rgba(0,65,101,.55); } .ds-cta:active { transform: translateY(0); } .ds-cta:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #004165; outline-offset: 3px; }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: Form submits and editor actions; quieter than the blue CTA.
components.css: .ds-btn { font-family: 'Source Sans 3', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.8125rem; font-weight: 600; color: #fff; background: #11252f; border: 1px solid #11252f; border-radius: 7px; padding: 10px 16px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 130ms, border-color 130ms; } .ds-btn:hover { background: #3a4d56; border-color: #3a4d56; } .ds-btn:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #004165; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Tertiary actions (Add, New round); outlined and light.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { font-family: 'Source Sans 3', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.8125rem; font-weight: 600; color: #3a4d56; background: #fff; border: 1px solid #c5cccc; border-radius: 7px; padding: 10px 16px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 130ms, color 130ms, border-color 130ms; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: #f5f6f6; color: #11252f; } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #004165; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Topic Card (open)
components.description: An open topic on the board; becomes a big clickable target in picking mode.
components.html:
Open
What is a small win you had this week?
components.css: .ds-card { display: flex; flex-direction: column; text-align: left; background: #fff; border: 1px solid #dde2e2; border-radius: 15px; padding: 15px 17px 14px; min-height: 118px; transition: border-color 130ms cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1), box-shadow 130ms, transform 220ms; } .ds-card:hover { border-color: #004165; box-shadow: 0 10px 34px -16px rgba(0,65,101,.26); transform: translateY(-3px); } .ds-status { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; align-self: flex-start; font-family: 'Source Sans 3', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.66rem; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.06em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #004165; background: #e7eef3; padding: 3px 9px 3px 7px; border-radius: 999px; margin-bottom: 11px; } .ds-status svg { width: 12px; height: 12px; } .ds-card-hl { font-family: 'Source Sans 3', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 1.05rem; font-weight: 600; line-height: 1.28; letter-spacing: -0.01em; color: #11252f; }

components.name: Roster Chip
components.description: A present participant in the roster; click the name to hand them a topic.
components.css: .ds-chip { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; background: #fff; border: 1px solid #c5cccc; border-radius: 999px; padding: 5px 12px; } .ds-chip-name { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 7px; background: none; border: 0; padding: 0; cursor: pointer; font-family: 'Source Sans 3', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 600; color: #11252f; } .ds-chip-name svg { width: 13px; height: 13px; color: #004165; } .ds-chip-name:hover { color: #004165; } .ds-chip-name:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #004165; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Roster and topic entry fields; Loyal Blue focus glow.
components.html: <input class="ds-input" type="text" placeholder="Add someone manually…" aria-label="Add participant" />
components.css: .ds-input { font-family: 'Source Sans 3', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.9375rem; color: #11252f; background: #fff; border: 1px solid #c5cccc; border-radius: 7px; padding: 11px 14px; width: 100%; transition: border-color 130ms, box-shadow 130ms; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #54656d; } .ds-input:focus { outline: none; border-color: #004165; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px #cfe0ea; }

components.name: Spotlight Reveal (signature)
components.description: The settled name on the darkened stage: white Montserrat under a warm Happy Yellow spotlight bloom.
components.html:
It's
Lena Hart
components.css: .ds-stage { position: relative; display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; gap: 16px; background: #05202e; border-radius: 15px; padding: 56px 32px; overflow: hidden; } .ds-spotlight { position: absolute; left: 50%; top: 46%; width: 520px; height: 520px; transform: translate(-50%,-50%); border-radius: 50%; pointer-events: none; background: radial-gradient(circle at center, rgba(242,223,116,0.42) 0%, rgba(242,223,116,0.18) 28%, transparent 62%); filter: blur(6px); } .ds-stage-label { position: relative; font-family: 'Source Sans 3', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.16em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #f2df74; } .ds-stage-name { position: relative; font-family: 'Montserrat', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: clamp(2.8rem, 9vw, 6rem); font-weight: 800; line-height: 1; letter-spacing: -0.035em; color: #f4fafc; text-shadow: 0 0 52px rgba(242,223,116,0.38); } .ds-glint { position: relative; width: 40px; height: 40px; color: #f6e58a; filter: drop-shadow(0 0 10px rgba(242,223,116,0.6)); }

narrative.overview: A tool with two temperaments. The host's board is calm preparation at the lectern: a white, composed control surface where a facilitator queues people and prompts without fumbling. The pick reveal and full-screen focus view are the moment of stepping into the light: the room dims to a deep Loyal Blue auditorium and a warm Happy Yellow spotlight finds the speaker. It is built on the Toastmasters International brand (Loyal Blue, Happy Yellow, True Maroon; Montserrat and Source Sans 3 standing in for Gotham and Myriad Pro), and should read as credibly Toastmasters to a club officer and as a confident modern tool to anyone else.
keyCharacteristics: Two surfaces, two temperaments: a quiet white board, a theatrical dark-blue stage.
The spotlight is the signature: a Happy Yellow bloom that only fires when a name settles.
Brand-exact color: every brand value is the literal hex from the Toastmasters manual.
Built to be read from the back row: large Montserrat display, high contrast on both surfaces.
Calm by default, loud on cue: motion and color are reserved for the reveal.

rules.name: The One Light Rule
rules.body: Happy Yellow is the spotlight and nothing else. It appears at the reveal and on the dark stage; it never becomes a button, a card fill, or a body color. Its scarcity is what makes the reveal feel like a reveal.

rules.name: The Brand-Exact Rule
rules.body: Loyal Blue is #004165, Happy Yellow is #f2df74, True Maroon is #772432, full stop. These are the Toastmasters manual's literal values and must not be re-tinted or nudged toward a custom hue.

rules.name: The Display-Is-For-The-Room Rule
rules.body: Montserrat at display weight is reserved for the name, the prompt, the wordmark, and the scoreboard numbers, the things a remote room reads. Everything operational is Source Sans 3.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces rest flat. A shadow means interactive or just-changed (hover, lift, the reveal). If a shadow isn't earning a state, delete it.

rules.name: The Blue-Shadow Rule
rules.body: Shadows are tinted Loyal Blue, never gray-black. A neutral drop shadow reads as a 2014 app; the blue tint keeps it in the brand.

dos: Do use the literal Toastmasters hex values: Loyal Blue #004165, Happy Yellow #f2df74, True Maroon #772432, Cool Gray #a9b2b1.
Do keep Happy Yellow for the spotlight and highlights only; let Loyal Blue carry actions and structure.
Do pair Montserrat (display) with Source Sans 3 (body) as the free stand-ins for Gotham and Myriad Pro.
Do keep body and placeholder text at Muted (#54656d) or darker for >=4.5:1; on the dark stage keep white-on-blue, never black-on-blue.
Do carry state with icon + word + color together, so open / on-now / done survive colorblindness and a low-quality screen share.
Do tint shadows Loyal Blue; keep the board flat until a state earns a lift.
Do leave a clean header slot where the official Toastmasters logo could be placed for official club use.
donts: Don't recreate, redraw, or customize the Toastmasters globe logo, and don't invent a club logo or tagline.
Don't put a patterned or colored glow behind the official logo if one is ever added; the yellow bloom belongs behind the speaker's name.
Don't re-tint or balance the brand colors, and don't introduce a non-brand accent.
Don't drift back toward the old cream-and-terracotta paper look, or any warm-neutral body background.
Don't go childish or gamified: no cartoon confetti, no bubbly oversized rounding, no game-show kitsch.
Don't turn the board into a dark hacker terminal, and don't reach for the generic cool-gray-cards-plus-safe-blue SaaS dashboard.
Don't let Happy Yellow carry text on a light surface; use Accent-Deep #6b560f for gold text instead.
Don't use border-left/border-right greater than 1px as a colored stripe, gradient-filled text, or decorative glassmorphism.
Don't use em dashes in UI copy.
